description: You are a mechatronics engineer at an autonomous vehicle startup. The sensor fusion pipeline (integrating IMU, LiDAR, and GPS) at /home/ga/workspace/sensor_fusion/ is producing unstable localization outputs, including heading drifts, overconfident position estimates, and trajectory jumps at sensor update boundaries. Resolve the five critical bugs involving Kalman filtering, quaternion math, coordinate transforms, covariance fusion, and temporal synchronization. The task is complete when the test suite passes.
